summary_en: Suruga Bank reports zero share purchases in the May 15–18, 2026 tranche; buyback program authorized for up to 5M shares (¥12B) through December 31, 2026, but suspended during June 19, 2026 for trust-based equity compensation.
title_en: Notice of Treasury Share Acquisition Status
translation_en_brief:
Suruga Bank (8358, TSE Prime) filed a treasury share acquisition status report on May 18, 2026. During the three-day period from May 15–18, 2026, the company purchased zero shares at zero cost through open market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

Under a board resolution dated April 24, 2026, the company is authorized to acquire up to 5,000,000 ordinary shares (2.92% of outstanding shares) for a maximum of ¥12,000 million through December 31, 2026, via TSE market purchases. However, the buyback program is temporarily suspended from May 18 through June 19, 2026, to facilitate the distribution of shares under the company's trust-based equity compensation scheme for executive officers and senior employees, announced separately on May 14, 2026.
